title: eulophia dabia
intro: Eulophia dabia, also known as the snake's tongue orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eulophia dabia include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Eulophia dabia is typically used in teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also applied topically as a paste or salve to harness its medicinal properties.
